title: loom.runner v1
description: GitHub self-hosted runner liveness events. Emitted by runner-probe on state transitions (online→offline, offline→online, idle→busy). Diff-only emission: only fires when runner status actually changes, keeping the channel quiet in steady state.

runner_name.description: GitHub Actions runner name as registered in the repo settings

repo.description: Full repo slug (owner/name) this runner belongs to

status.description: Current runner status from GitHub Actions API

event.description: State transition that triggered this event

labels.description: GitHub runner labels (e.g. self-hosted, Linux, X64)

last_seen.description: RFC3339 UTC — when runner was last seen in the expected state
